question: Some people believe that technology has made our lives more complicated. Others think it has made life easier. Discuss both views and give your own opinion.

paragraphs.text: Technology has transformed modern life in ways that are both helpful and overwhelming.
On one hand, smartphones and online services allow people to communicate instantly and complete daily tasks more efficiently.
However, many argue that constant connectivity creates stress and reduces face-to-face interaction.
In my view, technology itself is not the main problem.

task_response.limiting_factor: Some ideas could be more fully developed

annotations.issue_type: Good · Clear introduction of both views

evidence.quote: Technology has transformed modern life in ways that are both helpful and overwhelming.
evidence.reason: Opens with a balanced framing that previews discussion of both sides.

annotations.feedback: 开头有效概括了题目双方观点，为后文讨论奠定基础。
annotations.revision_guidance: Keep this pattern in your revision.

evidence.quote: On one hand, smartphones and online services allow people to communicate instantly and complete daily tasks more efficiently.
evidence.reason: Clear paragraph opener but could link more explicitly to the question.

annotations.feedback: 段落主题句清晰，但可更明确回扣题目中 technology makes life easier 的论点。
annotations.revision_guidance: Add a phrase that directly echoes the question wording.

evidence.quote: However, many argue that constant connectivity creates stress and reduces face-to-face interaction.
evidence.reason: Uses less common collocation constant connectivity appropriately.

annotations.feedback: 词汇搭配 natural，体现了一定的学术表达范围。
annotations.revision_guidance: Keep this pattern in your revision.

evidence.quote: In my view, technology itself is not the main problem.
evidence.reason: Clear opinion but under-developed in this paragraph.

annotations.feedback: 立场表达清楚，但本段论证展开不足，影响任务回应深度。
annotations.revision_guidance: Extend this paragraph with one concrete example supporting your view.

overall_feedback.summary: 文章结构完整，能讨论双方观点并给出个人立场，但在论证深度与衔接自然度上仍有提升空间。
priority_issues: 加强主体段论证展开，避免观点过于概括
改善段落间逻辑衔接，减少机械连接词
next_steps: 为每个主体段增加一个具体例子
写完后检查是否明确回应了题目的两个观点
reflection_questions: 你的结论段是否清晰重申了个人立场？
每个段落是否只讨论一个核心观点？
